$comment: Agentic QE Framework v3 — User-configurable settings.

timeouts.$comment: Override these for slower enterprise apps. Values in milliseconds.

pipeline.$comment: overlayCheckBeforeActions: opt-in pre-action overlay detection. Default false. Enable for public-facing apps with mid-test ad popups. Not needed for enterprise/internal apps.

observability.$comment: All agents MUST populate observability fields in their metrics JSON.
